description: Traces and visualizes 3D vector and point operations with various representations
utility: Show component decomposition, vector operations, or coordinate system visualization in 3D

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: The vector, line, or point to trace

alternates.description: Show x, y, z component vectors

alternates.syntax: trace3d(graph, vector, type(forward), distance) or type(backward)
trace3d(graph, vector, type(reverse)) or type(chain), type(sum), type(diff), type(norm), type(scale)
alternates.description: Show reverse, tip-to-tail chaining, addition, subtraction, normalization, or scaling
Show projection lines to x, y, z axes

alternates.syntax: trace3d(graph, point1, type(distance), point2) or type(length)
trace3d(graph, point, type(spherical)) or type(cylindrical), type(rectangular)
alternates.description: Show spherical, cylindrical, or rectangular coordinate system

examples.scenario: Trace point projection with spherical coordinate type and buffered display
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(3,1), view(28, 24))
P = point3d(G, 2, 1, 1)
trace3d(G, P, type(5),buff(-2,15))
P1 = point3d(g, 0, 0, 0); P2 = point3d(g, 3, 4, 5); trace3d(g, P1, type(distance), P2)
